title: deps: bump selinux to v1.14.1
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind cleanup

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

1. Remove unused function.
2. Bump oc/selinux to v1.14.1

#### How to verify it

Existing tests should be sufficient

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

Please review commit by commit. See commit messages for details.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

comments.body: Checked for any existing ReserveSELinuxLabels users [here](https://sourcegraph.com/search?q=ReserveSELinuxLabels&patternType=keyword&sm=0&df=%5B%22file%22%2C%22Exclude+vendor%22%2C%22-file%3A%28%5E%7C%2F%29vendor%2F%22%5D&__cc=1).
Can someone please add 'No New Tests' here (or allow me to do that?)
ReserveSELinuxLabels() s a public API, and I'm not particularly enthusiastic about breaking those in general.  Does libpod still need to start calling it?
